title: GunWie
description: A team-based tactical shooter + Mini-Games for Minecraft
body:
Official modpack for the Gunwie Competitive Shooter server.

GunWie is a multiplayer team based tactial shooter in Minecraft

In GunWie, players are divided into two teams: red and blue. Each match typically involves a objective to eliminate the opposing team. Players can choose from a variety of weapons and equipment, with strategic gameplay emphasizing teamwork, communication, and skillful shooting.

We also offer a Free For All gamemode and hopefully more in the future.
